title: After the Hanshin J.F.: Behind the Pillar

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Why is she being called out specifically? Is
she special or something?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... She's pretty small. Maybe she expects
special treatment? She ran well, though, so that's
promising.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, interesting.
Hey! Make sure you listen to what the grown-ups
say!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that about sums it up! Sweep, Trainer,
please make sure you're on time for the concert!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! I'd like to talk to you alone for a
minute!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
We've heard about what happened the other
day...

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
Would you like me to come to the waiting room
twenty minutes beforehand? I can call for extra
help if necessary.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remember the conversation I had with Sweep
Tosho's grandmother.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
But have you ever felt that people are worrying
about you so much because they might not have
faith in you?

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
Yes. That is, the staff who were there on the day
of her debut have been rather worried.

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
They said she's very spoiled, and they're worried
she might suddenly back out of the concert...

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure? Wouldn't it be best to set up some
kind of contingency plan just in case?

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
...All right, then. You're her trainer, so if you say
so.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Hanshin J.F. concert begins. Sweep Tosho
takes the stage right on time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And she does exactly what she's supposed to do.
